methodology: Systematic search of PubMed, EMBASE, and Cochrane Library using MeSH terms: 'catheter', 'percutaneous coronary intervention', 'vascular access', 'catheter-related complications'. PICO framework applied.
summary_of_new_data_performance_or_safet: 23 relevant articles identified. No new safety signals identified specific to the SurgiFlow Catheter design. Published complication rates for similar catheters align with observed complaint rates.
newly_observed_uses: No off-label or newly observed uses identified in literature.
state_of_the_art_changes: Two new hydrophilic coating formulations published in 2023 demonstrating improved trackability. No mandatory design change indicated.
comparison_with_similar_devices: Comparable catheters from three competitors reviewed. Tip detachment rate for SurgiFlow is within the published range for the device category.
